title: Kubernetes Gateway API Support Design
summary: Design for a new operator controller that watches Kubernetes Gateway API route resources and syncs route hostnames to the router-hosts gRPC server.
notes: Draft design doc with technical implementation contracts (controllers, typed client, RBAC, schema) — classified SPEC. Competes with DOC (design rationale prose) and ADR (has 'Design Decisions' with trade-off analysis), but implementation-contract content dominates. Status is Draft, so not locked.
